message:
fix: remove t.Parallel() from embeddeddolt tests to fix data races

The embedded Dolt tests share a single process and database, so they
cannot safely run in parallel. The -race detector caught this in CI
after #2734 was merged. The cmd/bd embedded tests are unaffected as
each creates its own isolated test store.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
